title: Data Fabric Monthly Status Report
executiveSummary: Phase 0 activities are proceeding on schedule. Infrastructure upgrades on LAVA are 80% complete. MVP-1 delivery is targeted for March 21, 2026. Team onboarding is complete with all planned staff in place.
accomplishments: Completed LAVA server rack installation and initial configuration
Finalized program governance documentation and stakeholder RACI
Initiated data source inventory across 6 priority systems
Completed architecture baseline review with client
risks: Risk: Network switch procurement lead time may delay Phase 1 start — mitigation plan in place

title: Data Fabric Monthly Status Report
executiveSummary: Program kickoff completed successfully. All Phase 0 tasks initiated. Team building and tool procurement activities on track. Infrastructure upgrade planning finalized.
accomplishments: Conducted program kickoff with full stakeholder attendance
Established secure development environment on LAVA
Completed initial threat model and security architecture review
Procured and received core compute hardware
risks: Risk: Classified facility access scheduling for new team members — being actively managed

title: Data Fabric Monthly Status Report
executiveSummary: Program officially commenced January 2026. Initial planning activities underway. Program Management Office established. Contract vehicle and funding confirmed.
accomplishments: Program office stood up; PMO tools and processes established
Initial work breakdown structure (WBS) and schedule drafted
Key personnel identified and hiring actions initiated
Kickoff meeting scheduled and invitations distributed
risks: Risk: Key personnel clearance processing timelines — tracking closely
